problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
